parameters.content:
## SA_RAG Workflow (Smart Save)

Granular KB storage with smart duplicate detection:
1. Receives query, userID, category
2. Finds semantically similar existing entries
3. Deletes ONLY matching content (not whole category)
4. Generates embedding and inserts new entry

### Table: user_vector_knowledge_base
- user_id (explicit column)
- document
- category (explicit column)
- embedding
- source

### Called By:
- Personal Assistant (Save to KB tool)
- Other agents that need to store information

parameters.query:
-- Smart delete: Find and remove semantically similar entries
-- Uses text similarity to find matching content in same category
WITH similar_entries AS (
  SELECT id, document,
    similarity(LOWER(document), LOWER('{{ $json.keyTerms }}')) as sim_score
  FROM public.user_vector_knowledge_base
  WHERE user_id = '{{ $json.userID }}'
    AND category = '{{ $json.category }}'
    AND LOWER(document) % LOWER('{{ $json.keyTerms }}')
)
DELETE FROM public.user_vector_knowledge_base
WHERE id IN (
  SELECT id FROM similar_entries WHERE sim_score > 0.3
)
RETURNING id, LEFT(document, 100) as deleted_preview;

INSERT INTO public.user_vector_knowledge_base (user_id, document, category, embedding, source)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('When Called').item.json.userID }}',
  '{{ $('When Called').item.json.query.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $('When Called').item.json.category }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.data[0].embedding) }}',
  'N8N-agent'
)
RETURNING id;
